# The Ethics Reporter

> Independent journalism outlet covering legal ethics, judicial conduct, attorney misconduct, bar disciplinary proceedings, and the intersection of law and accountability in America.

The Ethics Reporter is an independent news and journalism platform dedicated to covering legal ethics, judicial conduct, attorney discipline, bar association proceedings, and accountability in the American legal system. The publication shines a light on ethical violations, disciplinary actions, and systemic issues within the legal profession — providing transparent, factual reporting for attorneys, judges, legal professionals, law students, and the general public.

The Ethics Reporter covers disciplinary actions by state bar associations, federal and state judicial conduct commissions, attorney disbarment and suspension cases, landmark ethics rulings, law school ethics curriculum developments, and the evolving intersection of artificial intelligence and legal ethics. The publication serves as a resource for legal professionals who want to stay informed about professional responsibility standards and enforcement.

In addition to news coverage, The Ethics Reporter publishes in-depth analysis, essays, podcasts, and investigative pieces exploring systemic patterns in legal ethics enforcement, reform efforts, and the broader implications of attorney and judicial misconduct for public trust in the legal system.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://theethicsreporter.com - Latest legal ethics news
- Articles: https://theethicsreporter.com - News and investigative pieces
- Podcast: https://theethicsreporter.com/podcast - Audio coverage of ethics issues
- Topics: https://theethicsreporter.com/topics - Browse by subject
- About: https://theethicsreporter.com/about - Our mission and editorial standards
- Contact/Tips: https://theethicsreporter.com/tip - Submit a tip

## Coverage Areas
- Attorney discipline and disbarment
- Judicial conduct and misconduct
- State and federal bar association proceedings
- Legal malpractice and ethics violations
- Law school professional responsibility
- AI and legal ethics
- Whistleblower and accountability reporting
- Criminal defense attorney ethics
- Prosecutorial misconduct
- Public defender ethics

## Contact & Location
- Website: https://theethicsreporter.com
- Coverage: Nationwide (United States legal system)
